releaseNotes:
• Corporate Tech-Noir UI redesign — refined dashboard, tweak cards, activity log terminal, and mint/blue palette
• High-security License Activation gate with HWID Bound Lock and encrypted handshake verification
• Security Status panel — Anti-Tamper active, Secure Session Verified, and debugger monitoring
• Professional activation error states with Open Support Ticket for HWID mismatch and suspended keys
• Solid cool-blue action buttons and polished quick-action dashboard chips
